tasks.subject: Task 0: Backend helpers (severity + date-keys)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract pure utility functions (toLocalDateKey, startOfLocalDay, daysBetween, computeSeverity) with unit tests before producers need them.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/helpers/date-keys.ts
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/helpers/date-keys.spec.ts
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/helpers/severity.ts
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/helpers/severity.spec.ts

**Verify:** `cd backend && npx jest src/modules/calendar/helpers/ -v` → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/modules/calendar/helpers/date-keys.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/helpers/date-keys.spec.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/helpers/severity.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/helpers/severity.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && npx jest src/modules/calendar/helpers/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toLocalDateKey returns YYYY-MM-DD in local TZ", "computeSeverity branches on -1/0/7/8 boundaries", "daysBetween handles same-day, future, past"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Update CalendarEventDto (optional title, daysOverdue)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mark title/description optional on CalendarEventDto and add daysOverdue?: number. Keep CONTRACT_START/END in enum for now (drop in T6).

**Files:**
- Modify: backend/src/modules/calendar/dto/calendar-event.dto.ts

**Verify:** `cd backend && npm run build` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/modules/calendar/dto/calendar-event.dto.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["title and description optional", "daysOverdue?: number added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ContractEventsProducer with severity by proximity
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Producer for DRAFT check-in + ACTIVE checkout events. No 7-day window. Severity computed by proximity. Skip CONTRACT_START/END emission.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/contract-events.producer.ts
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/contract-events.producer.spec.ts

**Verify:** `cd backend && npx jest src/modules/calendar/producers/contract-events.producer.spec.ts -v` → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/contract-events.producer.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/contract-events.producer.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && npx jest src/modules/calendar/producers/contract-events.producer.spec.ts -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DRAFT >7d → DEPOSIT_CHECKIN_DUE info", "DRAFT ≤7d → DEPOSIT_CHECKIN_DUE warning", "past DRAFT → DEPOSIT_CHECKIN_OVERDUE danger with daysOverdue", "no CONTRACT_START/END emitted", "ACTIVE checkout symmetric", "buildingId filter works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: InvoiceEventsProducer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Producer for invoice due/overdue events, severity by proximity for DUE, DANGER for OVERDUE.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/invoice-events.producer.ts
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/invoice-events.producer.spec.ts

**Verify:** `cd backend && npx jest src/modules/calendar/producers/invoice-events.producer.spec.ts -v` → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/invoice-events.producer.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/invoice-events.producer.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && npx jest src/modules/calendar/producers/invoice-events.producer.spec.ts -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["INVOICE_DUE emitted for future dueDate", "INVOICE_OVERDUE with daysOverdue for past", "buildingId filter works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: PaymentDueProducer with invoice dedupe
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate PAYMENT_DUE reminders. Suppress when invoice with matching (contractId, billingPeriod.year/month) exists. Multi-month cycles + payDay clamping supported.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/payment-due.producer.ts
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/payment-due.producer.spec.ts

**Verify:** `cd backend && npx jest src/modules/calendar/producers/payment-due.producer.spec.ts -v` → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/payment-due.producer.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/producers/payment-due.producer.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && npx jest src/modules/calendar/producers/payment-due.producer.spec.ts -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PAYMENT_DUE emitted on payDay of cycle months", "suppressed when invoice exists for (contractId, month, year)", "PAYMENT_DUE_OVERDUE DANGER for past", "multi-month cycle respected", "payDay clamped to last day of month"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CalendarService orchestrator + module wiring + /overdue endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite calendar.service.ts as thin orchestrator over the 3 producers. Add getOverdue. Wire producers in module. Add GET /calendar/overdue.

**Files:**
- Modify: backend/src/modules/calendar/calendar.service.ts (rewrite)
- Modify: backend/src/modules/calendar/calendar.module.ts
- Modify: backend/src/modules/calendar/calendar.controller.ts
- Create: backend/src/modules/calendar/calendar.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** `cd backend && npm run build && npx jest src/modules/calendar/ -v` → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/modules/calendar/calendar.service.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/calendar.module.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/calendar.controller.ts", "backend/src/modules/calendar/calendar.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && npm run build && npx jest src/modules/calendar/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service < 120 lines", "getEventsInRange + getEventsByDay + getMonthSummary + getOverdue defined", "getOverdue returns DANGER only, desc order", "/overdue endpoint exposed"]}
```


```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/lib/calendar/event-colors.ts", "frontend/src/lib/calendar/event-display.ts", "frontend/src/lib/calendar/event-display.test.ts", "frontend/src/lib/calendar/grid-helpers.ts", "frontend/src/lib/calendar/grid-helpers.test.ts", "frontend/src/api/calendar.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx vitest run src/lib/calendar/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EVENT_COLORS has 8 entries with bar classes", "composeEventBarLabel handles N/A roomName", "buildMonthGrid returns 35 or 42 cells starting Monday", "calendar.ts type union drops CONTRACT_START/END", "calendarApi.getOverdue added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: useCalendarData hook with eventsByDay derivation

